installed.name: @tormentnexus/control-plane
installed.description: TormentNexus AI control plane — L2 memory, tool discovery, session import, skill registry, code search
installed.context:
TormentNexus is a local AI control plane running on port 7778 with persistent L2 vector memory, semantic tool discovery, imported sessions, and a skill registry.

## Best Practices
1. Use mcp_tormentnexus_memory_scratchpad_get before significant work
2. Use mcp_tormentnexus_memory_scratchpad_set after key decisions
3. Use mcp_tormentnexus_mcp_list_tools for tool discovery
4. Route complex tasks through mcp_tormentnexus_mcp_call_tool
5. Use mcp_tormentnexus_repomap for codebase orientation
